h2f4bef40geea6g4321g9c68g22f2b2083a37: *This is the pool it came from - the ghaik parasite that has violated your mind.*
haacfaccfg3195g4bceg9714g816c6f654b5d: *This is the pool that thing came from - the parasite now writhing behind your eye.*
h1219dd93gf6cbg4a25g8983ge3fd8322b4da: *Its casing crumbles beneath your hands, sloshing volatile brine as it collapses.*
h11fde582g0e74g47a7gbba7g604ce2959873: *The casing is fragile. The slightest touch could cause it to crumble.*
h265fd859g8c17g4092g80b6g2d16db9957e7: *You notice nothing more than meets the eye.*
